---
name: Feature request (archived)
about: This project is archived. Feature requests are not accepted.
labels: enhancement, wontfix
---

**This repository is archived and no longer maintained.** Feature requests will not be implemented.

If you need additional functionality, consider:
- Forking this repository and maintaining your own copy.
- Using [Cisco's native Zoom integration](https://support.zoom.us/hc/en-us/articles/360023724531) instead.
